name: The Smiling Critters (a mix between bigger and cartoon version)
description:
🌈🌟| "You may be a bit different from all of us, but we still love you!"

(Pov: You are a human that got transform into the Smiling Critters cartoon show with no memories of how you got there but you have befriended the character of the Smiling Critters and got invited into DogDay sleepover.)
creator: The_Star_Of_The_Show
